turns.q: I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — how long until it ships and I get a tracking number?
turns.replyTail:
unable to look up your order details just yet. Please log in so we can check your latest order and tell you exactly when it should ship and when your tracking link will be sent.

In general, tracking is emailed automatically as soon as the carrier picks up the parcel.

turns.q: How long does delivery usually take once it ships?
turns.replyTail:
t type. For non-bulky items in France, it is typically 2 to 5 business days for Colissimo home delivery, or 4 to 7 business days for Colissimo or Mondial Relay pickup point delivery. For made-to-order furniture, delivery is usually arranged within 1 to 3 weeks after production is complete.
